hero.label: Product Designer
hero.name: Lior Baum
hero.description: Crafting digital experiences that merge aesthetics with functionality. Based in Israel, currently available for freelance work.

about.label: About Me
bio: Hey, I'm Lior — a Product & UX Designer drawn to complex B2B SaaS and MedTech. I love taking tangled systems and dense workflows and turning them into interfaces people actually enjoy using.
I'm into design, technology, and AI — and how they keep reshaping the way we build. I care a lot about improving myself, learning something new every week, and pushing my craft forward.
Outside Figma, you'll usually find me with a good coffee in hand, thinking up the next thing to make. Always happy to chat — especially if complicated systems are involved.

experience.description: Designing the iTero™ scanner experience end-to-end — from patient onboarding and scan setup to post-scan insights — plus cleaning up navigation and discoverability across the iTero™ Store.
Helping designers ship real products with AI-assisted tools like Cursor and Claude. Code reviews, mentorship, and bridging design thinking with implementation.
Redesigned the asset management panel and risk-detection flows inside a complex privacy platform, partnering with privacy officers and PMs.
Reimagined the clinician dashboard for digital PT sessions, simplified core task flows, and built onboarding to drive product adoption.
